rationale: Support question about 'no primary server available' with Mongoose; connection behavior, no specific spec rule cited.
Socket closed error during find/sort/limit with wiredTiger; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Raw mode batched reads bug specific to 'raw: true' driver option; driver-specific feature not in any spec area.
insertedIds double-mapped due to redundant mapping call; CRUD spec defines correct InsertManyResult shape including insertedIds.
Auth fails on reconnect when using db.db() shared connections; credential-state management bug, no specific spec rule named.
Connection socket closed during long query (>1min); implementation/timeout bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Cannot find module '../build/Release/bson'; native addon packaging/build issue.
Deprecate textSearchEnabled server parameter; internal API cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Client fails to recover connectivity after network interfaces brought down/up; reconnection implementation bug.
TypeError: Cannot read property 'noRelease' of undefined in server.js; JS null-dereference implementation bug.
Timeout of admin.$cmd in replicasetInquirer not handled; thin description, unclear spec involvement.
Driver fails to reconnect after second mongodb restart; reconnection state machine bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Promise and callback versions of bulkWrite differ on partial errors; API design inconsistency, not a spec conformance issue.
aggregate() mutates caller's options object via getReadPreference; implementation bug, no spec rule about option immutability.
'Invalid collection name' for $cmd.sys.inprog; overly strict validation, not a spec-defined behavior.
findOneAndUpdate treats string first arg as empty document; API ergonomics/validation issue, not spec conformance.
API documentation uses wrong callback type for findAndModify; documentation error, no driver behavior change.
Feature request: wait for in-flight ops before MongoClient.close; graceful shutdown feature, not spec behavior.
Thousands of connections opened to RECOVERING server; connection pool flood, implementation bug with no specific spec rule.
Package 2.1.7 includes 2MB .nyc_output directory; npm packaging/publish issue.
createIndex routes to secondary when secondaryPreferred is set; write ops must always go to primary per server-selection spec.
Bulk.execute() throws TypeError when called without callback; missing null-check, implementation bug.
Exponential connection increase regression in 2.1.8; connection pool implementation regression, no spec rule.
4000 connections on reconnect; pool connection flood regression, no specific spec rule cited.
Huge memory consumption during repeated insertOne calls; memory leak, no spec-defined behavior contradicted.
Connection settings documentation has mistakes and ambiguities; documentation quality improvement, no driver behavior change.
App stays alive after db.close() in 2.1.8+; event loop lifecycle regression, no spec rule involved.
Connections leak on secondaries and arbiters over time; connection pool leak, no specific spec rule contradicted.
checkKey option set to true in mongodb-core ignores higher-level false; implementation layering bug for index key validation.
Driver authenticates against arbiters; auth spec requires auth only on data-bearing nodes, not arbiters.
Connection leak on secondary; duplicate of NODE-687, connection pool leak, no spec rule.
Refactor MongoClient options to simplify code and unify code paths; internal refactor, no behavior change implied.
Implement custom id functions for GridFS; new feature addition, not a spec conformance fix.
loggerLevel option swallowed in MongoClient options parsing; driver logging configuration bug, not spec behavior.
Implement BSON-Corpus test suite; adding BSON spec conformance test corpus, test infrastructure work.
drop/db.command with secondaryPreferred gets 'not master'; write ops must be sent to primary per server-selection spec.
Connection drops and won't recover regression in 2.1.19+; reconnection regression, no specific spec rule cited.
db.close calls topology.close synchronously causing destroyed topology errors; async/lifecycle bug, no spec rule.
npm 'latest' tag accidentally points to 2.1.8 instead of 2.1.18; npm release management issue.
Callback never called when retrying find/findOne after internet drop; callback lifecycle/reconnect bug.
'nearest' readPreference logged as 'secondaryPreferred' by mongos; server-selection spec defines exact mode-to-wire mapping; Python comparison used.
'not authorized' errors disappear at poolSize:1; auth race condition in pool, no specific spec rule named.
createCollection hangs when no primary with connectWithNoPrimary:true; callback dropped, no spec rule about this error path.
DB logs show query executing before authenticate completes on new connection; auth spec requires auth before application ops.
Regression flooding 'not authorized' in 2.1.20/2.1.21; auth regression with no description of root cause.
this.s.topology.unref is not a function; missing method implementation in topology abstraction.
Arbiter logs show driver authenticating against it; description explicitly cites NODE-693 as known wrong behavior.
Object.assign undefined on Node v0.12; JavaScript ES6 compatibility issue, not driver behavior.
ObjectID timestamp byte order changed in 2.2.0; BSON spec defines exact ObjectID byte layout, regression broke it.
Object.assign missing on Node 0.12; same root cause as NODE-747, JavaScript compatibility issue.
